# Elena Rodriguez

## Senior Project Manager

Results-driven project manager with 8 years of experience delivering complex software projects on time and under budget. Expert in Agile and hybrid methodologies with a track record of managing cross-functional teams of up to 30 people. Skilled at translating business requirements into executable project plans.

## Work Experience

### Senior Project Manager | Microsoft
*04/2022 – Present*

- Managed delivery of Azure DevOps platform migration for 3 enterprise clients with combined contract value of $12M, completing all projects within scope and 5% under budget
- Orchestrated cross-functional team of 28 engineers, designers, and QA across 4 time zones to deliver a major product release 2 weeks ahead of schedule
- Implemented risk management framework using Monte Carlo simulations that improved project forecast accuracy from 65% to 92%, adopted as standard practice across the PMO
- Reduced project status reporting overhead by 40% by designing automated dashboards in Jira and Confluence that replaced manual weekly updates

### Project Manager | Atlassian

- Introduced capacity planning model that reduced sprint scope creep by 35% and improved team velocity predictability from 60% to 88%
- Negotiated scope adjustments with stakeholders for 3 at-risk projects, recovering $2.1M in potential budget overruns while maintaining feature commitments
- Mentored 4 associate project managers, developing training curriculum that reduced ramp-up time from 6 months to 8 weeks

### Associate Project Manager | Accenture

- Coordinated delivery of 8 client-facing web application projects with budgets ranging from $500K to $3M, maintaining 95% client satisfaction rating
- Led daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospectives for 3 concurrent Agile teams totaling 18 developers
- Created resource allocation model in Excel and Smartsheet that optimized utilization across projects, reducing bench time by 22%
